pages.text:
・1・・

—...

REPUBLIC OF CYPRUS

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

THE MINISTER

Nicosia, 12 September 1986

Mr. Minister and Dear Colleague,

With reference to the

Agreement for Cooperation in the Field of Tourism between

Government of

the Republic of Cyprus and the Government

of the Republic of France, I have the honour to inform you that the constitutional requirements for its entry into force have already been completed by the Government of

with Article 10

of the Agreement and having received the letter of your predecessor Mr.

dated 6 March 1986, informing us oi

the fulfilment by the French Government of

the necessary

procedures, I have the pleasure to confirm that the lgreement enters into 1orce

as of today, 12 September 1986.

Please accept, Mr. Minister

the assurances of my highest consideration.

Haunte

Georto Tacovou

His Excellency

Mr. Jean-Rernard RATMOND

Minister of Foreign Affairs the Republie of France
